top_stories.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
top_stories.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
top_stories.why_it_matters: This belongs in the top group because its effects reach across multiple parts of the ecosystem, such as enterprises, developers, platforms, users, or regulators. It has practical consequences beyond a narrow technical audience.

top_stories.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
